title: Existing zoning ordinances
doc_html:
§140.32. Existing zoning ordinances

            Existing zoning ordinances of the municipality shall continue in effect until repealed by ordinances enacted under the authority of this Subpart.

            Acts 1962, No. 52, §32. Amended by Acts 1976, No. 268, §1; Acts 1991, No. 166, §1; Acts 2020, No. 294, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2022.
doc_text:
§140.32.  Existing zoning ordinances
Existing zoning ordinances of the municipality shall continue in effect until repealed
by ordinances enacted under the authority of this Subpart.
Acts 1962, No. 52, §32.  Amended by Acts 1976, No. 268, §1; Acts 1991, No. 166,
§1; Acts 2020, No. 294, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2022.
